name: Midnight Tigers
based_on: A real-feeling indie rock four-piece from Portland
summary: A one-page site for an indie band: hero, tour dates, music, and a mailing-list signup.
setup_questions: What genre, in two or three words?
When and where is your next show?
why_good: Personal, emotional, and instantly recognizable — a perfect single-page HTML test of layout, type, and imagery.
